### `phpmyadmin:5-apache` - linux; arm variant v5


### `phpmyadmin:5-fpm-alpine` - linux; 386


	(compressed transfer size, not on-disk size)

### `phpmyadmin:fpm-alpine` - linux; ppc64le

